levels.name: IRON GATE
levels.desc: A pair of ferrets block the iron gate. One of them snorts. 'Hah — a fox? On the Path of the Sumurai? Go home, kit.'
levels.clear_desc: The ferrets go quiet. One of them laughs despite himself — 'Not bad, fox.' Watching them weave and sidestep, something clicks. Quick Steps. You're going to need that.

levels.name: BAMBOO TRAIL
levels.desc: Boars and rabbits hold the trail. The boars are slow — but the rabbits won't stay still long enough to hit.
levels.defeat_tip: Rabbits are extremely evasive. Don't waste heavy strikes on them — wait for your opening.
levels.clear_desc: The trail is yours. The rabbits were slippery, but you found the gaps. You're starting to understand — speed isn't just about hitting first.

levels.name: FOX DEN
levels.desc: Five rabbits have made themselves at home in the old fox den. They see you coming — and not one of them runs.
levels.defeat_tip: The rabbits move as a pack — they always strike at the 3rd turn, first action. Let them think they have you. Then make it count.
levels.clear_desc: Five against one, and not one of them ran. When the last rabbit dropped, you heard slow clapping from the tree line. A turtle steps out of the shadows, arms folded. 'You have skill, fox,' he says. 'Let me show you something.'

levels.name: SILENT SHRINE
levels.desc: The turtle leads you to a weathered shrine at the edge of the forest. Two otters and a ferret wait inside, arms crossed. 'My students,' the turtle says. 'If you can move them, perhaps you are ready to learn what I came here to teach.'
levels.defeat_tip: The turtle is the real threat — Still Wind builds Battle Spirit every moment he's left alone. Break his concentration and it wears off. The otters are consistent: Stream Slash, every turn. Don't count on evading your way through them.
levels.clear_desc: The shrine goes still. The turtle watches the last of his students hit the ground, then exhales slowly. 'Good.' He settles into a low stance — and you see something shift. A faint pulse gathering around him, born not from movement, but from stillness. 'That,' he says, 'is Still Wind. Battle Spirit from the breath, not the blade.' He holds it a moment, then lets it go. 'You will need it before this path is done.'

levels.name: 2 Turtles and a Rabbit
levels.desc: The path ends here — for now. Two turtle masters stand side by side, a rabbit stationed between them. They've been watching you since the shrine. This is their answer.
levels.defeat_tip: This is the hardest fight on the path. Don't rush it. You've seen Still Wind — you know their rhythm. Their patience is their strength, but patience cuts both ways. Find your moment and strike when they breathe.
levels.clear_desc: The last turtle staggers back. The students watching from the ridge go silent. The elder turtle looks at you for a long moment — then bows, just slightly. 'We have not seen a fox fight like that,' he says. The students exchange glances. No one argues.

levels.name: THE FALCON'S EYE
levels.desc: A shape drops from the treetops and lands before you — a falcon, arms folded, eyes sharp. 'I've been watching since the gate,' he says. 'Not bad for a fox. Let's see if you can keep up.'
levels.defeat_tip: The falcon moves fast — faster than anything you've faced. He acts before you can answer. Watch his rhythm and don't give him room to breathe.
levels.clear_desc: The falcon tilts his head — then grins. 'Hah. You actually kept up.' He steps forward and shows you something. One motion, fluid and nearly invisible. 'Shinsoku,' he says. 'Speed your enemy can't answer. Strike before they can think.' He steps aside. 'That's yours now, fox.'

levels.name: FALCON AMBUSH
levels.desc: You don't see them coming. A blur of wings, and a falcon drops from above. Then another. Then three more. They don't look surprised to find you here. They look like they were waiting.
levels.defeat_tip: These falcons are fast — but so are you. Shinsoku exists for this moment. Strike before they can set their footing and the numbers won't matter.
levels.clear_desc: Six falcons on the ground. You stand over all of them, breathing slow. The wind moves through the trees. Somewhere ahead, the Path of the Sumurai continues. You take a step forward.

levels.note: PLACEHOLDER — not yet placed on the map, order TBD
levels.name: AGAINST THE TIDE
levels.desc: A group of otters blocks the river crossing, laughing and splashing. They see you coming and fall into formation — still grinning. 'A fox on the path?' one calls out. 'Let's see what you've got!'
levels.defeat_tip: Stream Slash rides the current — you can dodge it, but you can't dodge forever. Stop running and fight back. Strike against the tide.
levels.clear_desc: The lead otter splashes over, grinning ear to ear. 'Not bad, fox! Not bad at all!' He shows you the motion — a flowing cut that follows like water. 'Stream Slash,' he says. 'Cuts right through the slippery ones. Doesn't matter how fast they move.' He winks. 'Now you try.'
